'''Celana Aldrete''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] and an [[Aide/Legends|aide]] of [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] during the early days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. She may have been related to [[Agrippa Aldrete/Legends|Agrippa Aldrete]], an aide of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]] during the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], and [[Alya Aldrete]], a [[Noble/Legends|noblewoman]]. Following [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], she was present when [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] were in search of [[Fang Zar/Legends|Fang Zar]], after they paid a visit with Bail Organa.
